creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text: I also do not like multiple LLVM versions polluting my laptop.  Another solution would be respecting LLVM_DEFAULT, either by holding off Mesa updates or keeping a local patch for that matter, but then again, no one is willing to do the work.  I simply keep some previous Mesa version around as it works just fine (luckily for us, X.org stack is not that tightly coupled).
